title: Ryanair invests £40m and extends bay in Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ryanair invests £40m and extends bay in Prestwick Airport. Ryanair has planned to invest £40 million in Glasgow Prestwick Airport (PIK) for the maintenance facilities' expansion.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair invests £40m and extends bay in Prestwick Airport
